headline: Sandro Tonali
body: 🚨🔵⚪️ EXCLUSIVE: Brighton agree deal to sign Luka Vušković from Tottenham, here we go! 💣 £46m fixed fee plus sell-on clause to bring the potential package over £50m. Massive signing for BHAFC after personal terms also agreed. 💣 Spurs ready to go ALL IN for Sandro Tonali.
raw_text:
🚨🔵⚪️ EXCLUSIVE: Brighton agree deal to sign Luka Vušković from Tottenham, here we go! 💣

£46m fixed fee plus sell-on clause to bring the potential package over £50m. Massive signing for #BHAFC after personal terms also agreed.

💣 Spurs ready to go ALL IN for Sandro Tonali.
text:

💣 Spurs ready to go ALL IN for Sandro Tonali.
draft_caption:
✅ TRANSFER- SANDRO TONALI CONFIRMED TRANSFER FROM NEWCASTLE UNITED TO BRIGHTON.

📝 CONTRACT — TBD
